{{Quote|Your lies are as pathetic as your denials.|[[Clat'Ha]] to Jemba|<ref name="The Rising Force" />}}
'''Jemba''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] in charge of the [[Offworld Mining Corporation]]'s [[Bandomeer/Legends|Bandomeer]] operations. He crash-landed on an unknown planet, and enslaved [[Arcona/Legends|Arconans]] on the ship, forcing them to work for the [[dactyl]] nutrition which he stole from them which was critical for Arconans to survive. His death was accidental when his right-hand Hutt, [[Grelb]], shot him while aiming for [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], who helped find the hidden dactyl.

==Biography==
In [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]], Jemba flew with miners of the [[Offworld Mining Corporation]] onboard the [[Monument (freighter)|''Monument'']] to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bandomeer/Legends|Bandomeer]]. He encountered [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and the young [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], who were leading the [[Arcona/Legends|Arcona]] [[Arcona Mineral Harvest Corporation|Mineral Harvest Corporation]]. When the ship was attacked by pirates, Jemba was able to steal the dactyl and force the Arcona Mineral Harvest Corporation workers to serve him until the ''Monument'' had to make an emergency landing on an island of an [[Unidentified blue marble planet|unknown planet]] with five moons.<ref name="The Rising Force" />

Just before the entire crew had to evacuate the ship due to flooding, Jemba and his thugs planned on hiding the stolen dactyl somewhere in the mountains until they encountered the native [[draigon]]s. A short time later, Jemba learned from his right-hand employee [[Grelb]] that the Jedi had found the dactyl. Jemba was furious and planned to kill the Jedi. He immediately attacked Obi-Wan, who was defending the cave entrance from a couple of draigons that were attacking. His employee had the same idea and shot faster than Jemba. However, Obi-Wan dodged Grelb's blaster bolt, which squarely hit Jemba's chest.<ref name="The Rising Force" />
